# BP-135 negative: the request-scoped GORM chain starts with WithContext.
lang: go
file: BP-135-safe.go
variant: gorm-global-http-context
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

func listUsers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *gorm.DB) {
	var users []User
	if err := db.WithContext(r.Context()).Where("active = ?", true).Find(&users).Error; err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "query failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
	}
}
